name: Tráfico Web Inusual Detectado (Posible Exfiltración)
description: Se ha detectado un volumen inusualmente alto de tráfico de datos salientes a través de HTTP/S, lo que podría indicar un intento de exfiltración de datos.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the network traffic event.

parameters.name: source_address
parameters.description: The source IP address of the machine initiating the transfer.

parameters.name: destination_address
parameters.description: The destination IP address of the server receiving the data.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user associated with the network activity, if available in logs.

parameters.name: bytes_transferred
parameters.description: The total number of bytes transferred in the session.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: The URL accessed during the transfer, if available.

parameters.name: http_method
parameters.description: The HTTP method used (e.g., GET, POST).

parameters.name: destination_port
parameters.description: The destination port of the network connection.
